prompt: add a plate fixation on the humerus
remarks: so basically a plate on the sholder bone, no nail or anywhere in the center except to fix the plate
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, an X-ray of a fractured human humerus. Add a radiopaque metallic plate fixation, secured with screws, positioned along the lateral aspect of the proximal humerus, spanning and stabilizing the visible fracture.
objects: Radiopaque metallic plate fixation along the lateral aspect of the proximal humerus
